mechanism_summary: I2S adds per-exec CMP-buffer cost with no substitution benefit: the gate is a pointer-arithmetic relation (start>=end), not an input-byte literal, so vpc's extra I2S stage yields no traction while lowering throughput relative to plain value_profile.
one_line: Pointer-arithmetic emptiness check; I2S has no literal to substitute

mechanism_summary: I2S splices valid-version comparands (magic 'lcms', version 0x03) back into the corpus, pulling seeds toward structurally-valid headers whose version byte stays <=0x09 and away from the >0x09 overflow side; winner reaches it by plain havoc.
one_line: Version byte >0x09 gate; I2S steers corpus toward valid version bytes

mechanism_summary: I2S offers no help because PNG_FIXED_ERROR is an internal sentinel produced by overflow arithmetic with no input-byte pre-image to splice; meanwhile I2S's per-CMP callback overhead lowers throughput, so naive's undirected havoc reaches the sentinel faster.
one_line: Internal overflow sentinel; I2S cannot substitute a computed value

mechanism_summary: I2S copies in-range fixed-point operands from CMP intercepts back into the bluex field, biasing the corpus away from the overflow range that decodes to the error sentinel; naive's undirected havoc stumbles the bytes into that range without any such pull-back.
one_line: Fixed-point overflow sentinel; I2S pulls bluex bytes toward valid range

mechanism_summary: I2S clears structural CMP roadblocks (length, CRC, magic) and drives the corpus toward large valid images deep in IDAT decoding, starving bKGD chunk bytes of random mutation; naive keeps inputs small and blindly randomizes chunk bytes, eventually flipping a high background byte non-zero.
one_line: Non-zero high background bytes; I2S drags corpus to valid IDAT-heavy inputs

mechanism_summary: I2S adds per-execution CmpLog-buffer overhead but provides no comparison-solving benefit on this loop-state branch (not gated by an exact comparand in input bytes); the overhead lowers throughput relative to plain value_profile, which reaches the state via havoc.
one_line: IDAT loop-state check; I2S overhead taxes throughput with no traction

mechanism_summary: I2S splices logged operands into the corpus, diverting mutation energy toward sibling encoding magic constants (e.g. UTF16BE), so the loser resolves a different gate rather than assembling the UCS4_2143 00 00 3C 00 window; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient climbs toward it without that diversion.
one_line: 4-byte UCS4_2143 magic; I2S diverts corpus to sibling encoding gates

mechanism_summary: I2S splices logged exact-literal comparands ('<![CDATA[', '<?xml', '<!DOCTYPE') back into the corpus, biasing seeds toward completing those multi-byte gates and the CDATA state machine rather than taking the false-side general-parse path; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient diversifies content leads without that pull.
one_line: 9-byte CDATA literal AND-chain false side; I2S biases corpus toward CDATA entry

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutes enumerated CURLOPT case-constants back into the selector byte, pinning the option to a known case and starving the default arm; havoc-only naive drifts freely onto non-enumerated values.
one_line: I2S locks selector onto known cases, blocking the default arm

mechanism_summary: Branch requires high-volume glyph-buffer traversal with no CMP gate; I2S overhead slows cmplog's throughput and reduces merge_clusters invocations, while naive's unencumbered havoc reaches the loop-exit false side more often.
one_line: I2S overhead slows throughput; havoc volume reaches loop-exit

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutes font-table literals (sfnt magic, GSUB/GPOS/MATH tags) into leading bytes, locking inputs to well-formed font structure and away from the free byte variation that lands the RTL script case.
one_line: I2S locks inputs to sfnt magic, blocking RTL script case

mechanism_summary: Adding I2S to value_profile adds per-execution CmpLog overhead on a deep call chain without delivering the script tag; the CMP_MAP gradient alone in value_profile incrementally approaches the OLD_UYGHUR constant, but the extra I2S cost kills throughput enough to block it.
one_line: I2S overhead on deep call chain overwhelms CMP_MAP gradient

mechanism_summary: I2S reads FOURCC tag comparison operands (GSUB, GPOS, MATH) and substitutes them back into the input, steering inputs toward valid well-formed font table tags and away from the degenerate/unrecognized bytes the RUNIC fall-through arm needs.
one_line: I2S substitutes FOURCC tags, pulling inputs away from fallthrough

mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts SFNT/OpenType table-tag CMP operands (MATH, GPOS, GSUB) and substitutes them into the header, pinning u.tag to TrueTypeTag and starving the rare DFontTag arm that naive's undirected byte mutation occasionally reaches.
one_line: I2S pins header to SFNT tags, blocking the rare DFont arm

mechanism_summary: Branch has no CMP operand; I2S per-execution overhead and operand-driven substitution divert the loser into expensive GPOS sanitize paths the winner never enters, delaying or preventing arrival at the stage-pause check.
one_line: I2S overhead diverts corpus into GPOS sanitize paths off-branch

mechanism_summary: Gate is a mask/range test (u & ~0xFF)==0x0E00 on a derived codepoint; I2S has no applicable operand to substitute, so the CmpLog stage burns execution budget without steering toward 0x0E-block bytes, while naive freely produces them by havoc.
one_line: I2S wastes budget on mask-derived codepoint; havoc hits 0x0E block

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient ratchets codepoint bytes toward 0x0E36 via distance-bucket feedback; adding I2S (vpc) diverts mutation/corpus budget away from this gradient climb, so the gradient-only fuzzer reaches the exact constant while vpc cannot.
one_line: I2S disrupts CMP_MAP gradient climb toward exact codepoint 0x0E36

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP Hamming-distance bucket feedback continuously rewards codepoint bytes that approach 0x0E37; the I2S stage added in vpc interferes with this gradient climb, preventing it from stably producing 37 0e at the decisive offset.
one_line: I2S interferes with CMP_MAP gradient toward codepoint 0x0E37

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient steers 0x0E-block codepoint bytes toward the Lao CCC118 value; I2S added in vpc floods the corpus with off-path CMP-substituted seeds, crowding out the gradient-steered path so vpc never sustains the required codepoint.
one_line: I2S corpus pollution crowds out CMP_MAP gradient toward CCC118

mechanism_summary: Combining class 129 is derived from glyph property tables, not compared against an input literal; I2S has no applicable operand and its per-execution CMP overhead slows exploration, while naive's plain havoc discovers the structural font content that yields CCC129.
one_line: I2S overhead wasted on table-derived combining class; havoc wins

mechanism_summary: CCC132 is derived from font tables, not a literal CMP operand; I2S stage in losers diverts budget to operand substitution that cannot influence a table-derived combining-class switch, leaving the CCC132 arm unreachable while havoc-only winners accumulate the right glyph bytes.
one_line: I2S wasted on table-derived CCC132; havoc-only winners reach arm

mechanism_summary: I2S copies space codepoint and unicode-space-class constants (like 0x0020) into the vpc corpus, biasing inputs toward space-classified codepoints that take the != NOT_SPACE true branch; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient instead steers toward valid non-space table-structure inputs reaching the false side.
one_line: I2S substitutes space constants, biasing corpus away from false branch

mechanism_summary: I2S substitution steers bytes toward the pictographic comparison operands at line 492, pulling cmplog onto the ZWJ-followed-by-pictographic true branch and starving the false branch; naive's havoc freely produces ZWJ-terminal or non-pictographic buffers.
one_line: I2S steers input to pictographic operands, blocking ZWJ false branch

mechanism_summary: The script enum is computed indirectly from font tables; I2S substitution cannot reach it directly and dilutes/pollutes the corpus and energy budget, starving the CMP_MAP gradient that value_profile uses unencumbered to walk toward the OLD_UYGHUR script value.
one_line: I2S corpus dilution starves CMP_MAP gradient toward indirect script enum

mechanism_summary: I2S over-fits both losers onto Hebrew mark literal switch arms (matching codepoints like 0x05B7/0x05BC), trapping them on the true-branch switch arms and preventing the broad structural/havoc exploration that occasionally yields a successfully-composing base+mark pair.
one_line: I2S traps losers on Hebrew mark switch arms, blocking compose escape

mechanism_summary: Ragel table dispatch uses array-index range check, not a logged scalar CMP; I2S has no equality operand to substitute and diverts budget, while naive's arithmetic byte mutation of the category stream randomly visits the case-19 transition.
one_line: I2S wasted on Ragel range dispatch; havoc arithmetic hits case 19

mechanism_summary: Gate is a multi-byte Ragel state-machine traversal with no single CMP operand; I2S gains no purchase and adds cost, while naive's long-sequence havoc/token mutation builds the dense category-byte run that drives the vowel-syllable reduction.
one_line: I2S wasted on Ragel multi-byte traversal; havoc builds category run

mechanism_summary: No CMP literal guards case 4; I2S steers bytes toward intercepted OpenType table-tag operands (kern etc.), diverting input away from the dense indic-category byte runs the state machine needs, while naive's free havoc produces those runs.
one_line: I2S diverts toward table tags, starving dense indic-category run

mechanism_summary: Branch requires syllable length >= 3 (start+3<=end); I2S spends budget on operand substitutions that do not increase syllable length, while naive's unconstrained byte-insert/copy havoc readily grows inputs long enough to satisfy the count threshold.
one_line: I2S fails to grow syllable length; havoc byte-insert reaches count

mechanism_summary: Gate is a glyph category/plan-config condition (Repha category + REPH_MODE_LOG_REPHA), not an input literal; I2S has no CmpLogObserver entry to exploit and its extra overhead diverts mutation away from the structural exploration naive performs to reach the Repha path.
one_line: I2S overhead wasted on category-config gate; havoc reaches Repha path

mechanism_summary: Gate is a position/category-classification predicate on shaped glyphs (limit-base<=2 with has_reph), not an integer/string CMP; I2S adds no leverage and its operand bias appears to steer cmplog away from the rare short-syllable Repha layout that naive's havoc stumbles onto.
one_line: I2S steers away from rare short-Repha syllable; havoc stumbles onto it

mechanism_summary: has_reph is set by a Repha-classified syllable path; I2S substitutes intercepted table-tag CMP operands (kern etc.) that steer cmplog onto a different syllable-type region, crowding out the LOG_REPHA structural exploration that naive's havoc achieves.
one_line: I2S table-tag substitution steers corpus away from LOG_REPHA path

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace overwrites byte runs to match logged CMP operands, displacing the Halant-category bytes that the post-base scan needs at position i, so the I_Cat(H) equality is never satisfied while naive's plain havoc assembles the structural sequence.
one_line: I2S displaces Halant-category bytes needed for post-base scan

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutes intercepted font-table-tag operands (kern/GPOS) back into the input, fixating the cmplog corpus on table-name strings and steering it away from the structured 4-byte glyph-record bytes (bf 0c 00 00) that naive's havoc builds to reach POS_RA_TO_BECOME_REPH.
one_line: I2S fixates corpus on font table tags, blocking Reph glyph records

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient incrementally builds structured Indic consonant-joiner syllables; adding I2S (vpc) displaces the gradient's incremental corpus growth by inserting whole-operand literal substitutions, disrupting the steady syllable assembly and causing vpc to block.
one_line: I2S literal substitution disrupts CMP_MAP gradient's syllable assembly

mechanism_summary: syllable_type is an internal nibble classification, not a logged CMP value; I2S substitution has nothing to target and wastes energy on category dispatch that havoc byte mutation reaches freely by varying codepoint bytes.
one_line: I2S gains no traction on nibble classification; havoc reaches case

mechanism_summary: I2S copies script-tag/codepoint CMP operands (Malayalam/Tamil script constants) back into the input, anchoring the buffer onto the Malayalam/Tamil true branch; naive's undirected havoc freely explores other script bytes, hitting the common non-Malayalam/non-Tamil false branch.
one_line: I2S anchors script to Malayalam/Tamil, blocking the false branch

mechanism_summary: Gate is is_halant on a post-shaping glyph category, not a CMP-solvable literal; I2S substitution confers no advantage and actively diverts mutation energy, while naive's broad havoc/token exploration builds the structural diversity needed to produce a halant-bearing Indic syllable.
one_line: I2S wasted on post-shaping halant category; havoc builds diversity

mechanism_summary: naive's broad havoc byte mutation builds structurally valid multi-glyph Indic codepoint records that produce Ra-classified syllables; cmplog's I2S substitution diverts energy toward CMP operands that cannot synthesize this glyph structure.
one_line: havoc builds Reph-syllable structure that I2S misdirection cannot reach

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc/token ops produce long uniform byte runs (BytesRandSet/Insert) that walk the Khmer Ragel machine into case 3; cmplog's operand-substitution stage breaks homogeneous runs toward discrete CMP targets, preventing the structural repetition required.
one_line: uniform byte run drives Khmer Ragel machine; I2S breaks run continuity

mechanism_summary: naive's plain havoc byte mutation lands Coeng-producing byte patterns (17 d2 runs) giving khmer_category==K_Cat(H); cmplog's I2S substitution targets CMP operands that are not the Unicode-property-derived category constant, wasting budget on irrelevant matches.
one_line: havoc lands Coeng Unicode category bytes; I2S substitution has no target

mechanism_summary: naive's BytesCopy/Insert/Inc/Add freely produce small low-byte structured patterns that drive myanmar_category into the case-8 Ragel transition; cmplog's I2S substitution injects table-header magic bytes (hasc/csah/SHOT) that displace the small-category pattern.
one_line: small low-byte havoc drives Myanmar Ragel case 8; I2S injects disruptive table tokens

mechanism_summary: naive's broad havoc/token mutation explores the glyph-category space and stumbles onto Ra-As-H trigraph bytes; cmplog's I2S substitution collapses onto a repeating lexical pattern (72 10 00 / 8d 10 00) that never decodes to the required Ra/As/H triple.
one_line: havoc stumbles onto Ra-As-H category trigraph; I2S locks onto wrong lexical pattern

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc/length mutators (BytesExpand/CrossoverInsert) iterate freely over the periodic 4-byte record layout accumulating VPre-classified glyphs; cmplog's per-CMP-buffer processing has no traction on category-table lookups and wastes budget on I2S substitutions.
one_line: periodic record mutation accumulates VPre glyphs; I2S has no category-table traction

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc+token mutation explores font byte space building a VBlw-after-main glyph sequence; cmplog's I2SRandReplace targets input-resident CMP operands but the VBlw gate is a parser-derived category constant, so substitution cannot influence it.
one_line: havoc builds VBlw-after-main glyph sequence; I2S cannot reach parser-derived category

mechanism_summary: naive's unconstrained havoc drifts glyph-record bytes into a VPre-containing category mix; cmplog's I2S over-constrains operand bytes to logged CMP values that produce non-VPre categories, pinning corpus away from the POS_PRE_M assignment path.
one_line: unconstrained havoc reaches VPre category; I2S over-constrains bytes away from it

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc byte mutation (BitFlip/BytesExpand/QwordAdd) preserves and extends the repeating 4-byte VPre record run producing multiple POS_PRE_M assignments; cmplog's comparison-solving mutator substitutes CMP-derived operands that derail the uniform multi-matra run.
one_line: repeating record havoc accumulates multiple VPre matras; I2S derails uniform run

mechanism_summary: naive's ByteRand/ByteInteresting/BytesRandSet mutation randomly places low byte 0x1B/0x1D/0x1F while the high byte stays 0x0E, hitting Thai consonant equality; cmplog's I2S substitutes at offsets that don't map to this decoded codepoint, diverting budget from the lucky-havoc solution.
one_line: lucky havoc lands Thai consonant codepoint bytes; I2S rewrites wrong offsets

mechanism_summary: non-I2S winners (naive, value_profile) land codepoint bytes 0f 0e / 0e 0e by plain havoc/token mutation; adding I2SRandReplace (cmplog/vpc) diverts mutation energy from simply hitting the codepoint literal and the losers never take the true branch.
one_line: plain havoc lands Thai codepoint literal; I2S diverts energy from it

mechanism_summary: naive's broad havoc/token mutation walks Thai mark+consonant byte combinations until the state-machine table lookup yields the SDL action; cmplog's I2S adds per-CMP overhead with no useful operand to substitute for this state-machine-derived enum.
one_line: havoc walks Thai state machine to SDL action; I2S has no enum operand to substitute

mechanism_summary: non-I2S winners (naive, value_profile) accumulate Thai mark/consonant codepoints by ordinary havoc mutation until state-machine lookup yields SL; the I2S-equipped losers find no input-byte comparison feeding the enum-valued switch operand and their corpus pollution diverts effort.
one_line: havoc accumulates Thai codepoints reaching SL action; I2S finds no enum operand

mechanism_summary: naive's byte-expansion/insert havoc (BytesExpand/Insert/RandInsert) grows inputs into long Thai-mark byte sequences that traverse the state machine until action==RD; cmplog's CMP-biased budget produces shorter inputs that under-drive the multi-glyph traversal.
one_line: byte-expansion havoc grows long Thai sequence to RD action; I2S keeps inputs short

mechanism_summary: naive's sequence-building havoc mutators (BytesExpand/InsertCopy/Copy/CrossoverInsert) grow the input into a long multi-glyph Thai sequence that drives action==RD; cmplog's operand-substitution targets fixed offsets, producing shorter inputs that under-drive the state machine.
one_line: length-growing havoc reaches action==RD; I2S substitution keeps inputs too short

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc/token mutation retains intact script/language tag substrings (srch, jy-hant) that map to real USE categories; cmplog's I2SRandReplace continually overwrites those bytes with CMP-harvested operands, displacing the structural glyph sequence needed.
one_line: havoc retains structural tag bytes building USE glyph sequence; I2S overwrites them

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc/token churns multi-byte glyph records (BytesInsertCopy/WordAdd/ByteRand) and in 8/10 trials lands category runs triggering Ragel case 14 numeral-cluster transition; cmplog's I2S substitution is off-target for a category-range dispatch and pollutes the corpus.
one_line: havoc churns glyph records hitting numeral-cluster Ragel case 14; I2S misfires on category gate

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc/length ops (BytesExpand/RandInsert) lengthen and vary glyph sequences producing category runs that route into the Ragel virama-terminated-cluster case 11; cmplog's I2S substitution targets integer/string CMP operands irrelevant to a table-range key dispatch.
one_line: length-and-variety havoc reaches USE virama case 11; I2S irrelevant to table-range dispatch

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc/interesting-byte mutations (BitFlip/DwordInteresting/QwordAdd) broadly vary glyph inputs and reach shaper-derived halant category; I2S-bearing losers substitute CMP operands that do not control the shaper-table classification, diverting budget from productive havoc.
one_line: broad havoc reaches shaper-derived halant USE category; I2S cannot influence table classification

mechanism_summary: naive's havoc/structural byte mutators (BytesExpand/BitFlip/ByteRand/BytesSwap/CrossoverInsert) explore byte arrangements that the USE shaper classifies as a halant glyph; cmplog's I2S substitution reads CmpLog operands but none map back to an input offset controlling the USE-table category, so per-CMP overhead slows exploration.
one_line: structural havoc stumbles onto USE halant category; I2S CMP operands map to no input offset

mechanism_summary: naive's plain havoc on the self-similar 64-a8 record skeleton reliably produces USE(R)-led glyphs in a length>1 syllable; cmplog's I2SRandReplace drags the input toward literal CMP targets (true/sn/art/b8), destroying the structured record stride needed for the gate.
one_line: havoc on repeated record skeleton produces USE(R) glyph; I2S destroys record stride

mechanism_summary: naive's pure havoc/token mutation broadly varies the byte stream so the font-mapped glyph buffer reaches a halant-bearing reorder syllable; cmplog's I2S substitutes logged CMP operands that do not build structural glyph-category state, leaving the halant path unreached.
one_line: pure havoc populates buffer with halant category glyph; I2S operand substitution cannot build it

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient incrementally preserves inputs whose codepoint CMP operands approach the Devanagari case constants without I2S interference; adding the I2SRandReplace stage adds per-execution overhead and corpus churn that dilutes the gradient-driven progress toward the 0x094X codepoints.
one_line: CMP_MAP gradient inches codepoint toward Devanagari constant; I2S overhead dilutes progress

mechanism_summary: naive's plain havoc/token mutation perturbs structured font tables enough to land the MALAYALAM script and 0x0D12 codepoint without CMP-substitution waste; cmplog's I2S spends budget substituting CMP operands that do not advance toward this script/codepoint gate.
one_line: structural havoc reaches Malayalam script and 0x0D12 codepoint; I2S misdirects budget

mechanism_summary: value_profile discovers the required 4-byte Tirhuta codepoint (8d 14 01 00 = 0x1148D) by plain havoc; value_profile_cmplog's I2S latches onto whichever sibling Tirhuta operand it last logged (0x11481/0x114AA), diluting the havoc budget and preventing the exact 0x1148B/0x1148D match.
one_line: plain havoc finds exact Tirhuta 4-byte codepoint; I2S latches onto wrong sibling operand

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient walks script-tag/table-magic CMP operands incrementally toward a USE-routed script tag, hitting the line-300 block; value_profile_cmplog's I2S additionally swaps in exact GSUB/GPOS/DFLT/latn literal operands, over-committing the corpus to earlier high-frequency case arms and starving the USE block.

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback incrementally ratchets short header bytes toward the Old Uyghur script-tag case constant; value_profile_cmplog adds I2S substitution that solves the GSUB/GPOS table-tag comparisons instead, pulling the corpus toward large sfnt-structured inputs that land on earlier/default script arms.
one_line: CMP_MAP gradient ratchets script-tag bytes to Old Uyghur case; I2S diverts to GSUB/GPOS literals

mechanism_summary: naive/value_profile's havoc byte mutation explores codepoint ranges and lands both a and b in the L/V Hangul jamo ranges; the I2S comparison-solving stage (cmplog/vpc) finds no single magic operand to substitute for a two-sided range gate and adds per-execution cost and corpus pollution.
one_line: havoc lands codepoints inside two Hangul jamo ranges; I2S has no single operand for range gate

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient accumulates diverse unicode-space codepoints without forcing exact equality; value_profile_cmplog's I2S substitution rewrites the switch comparand u with the exact case-literal operands (0x0020/0x00A0/0x2006), collapsing every space input onto enumerated cases and starving the default arm.
one_line: CMP_MAP gradient preserves diverse space codepoints reaching default; I2S collapses them onto enumerated cases

mechanism_summary: naive's undiluted havoc/token mutation explores deep address-add/remove state that populates the linked list so Find() returns a non-null predecessor; I2S-equipped losers spend per-execution CMP budget on operand substitution that doesn't build list state and slows the required state-space exploration.

mechanism_summary: I2S overwrites byte spans with logged CMP operands, collapsing input diversity toward a single homogeneous pattern; plain havoc mutation preserves heterogeneous list-building payloads that drive the loop's non-matching false side.
one_line: I2S homogenizes input, destroying list diversity needed for loop false-branch

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutes non-ICMPv6 protocol operands captured from other comparisons into the header byte region, steering the corpus away from 0x3a; naive havoc byte mutation lands the ICMP6 proto value by undirected saturation.

mechanism_summary: I2S finds no productive operand to substitute toward 0x3a and instead misdirects mutation budget onto other comparisons; naive havoc saturates IPv6 header offsets with repeated bytes and lands the ICMPv6 marker by chance.
